sources.title: Create and manage notebooks (API)
notes: Documents NotebookLM Enterprise notebook create, get, listRecentlyViewed, batchDelete, and share REST methods.
Uses discoveryengine.googleapis.com v1alpha endpoints with Google Cloud project number and location.

sources.title: Add and manage data sources in a notebook (API)
notes: Documents batch source creation for Google Drive, raw text, web content, and YouTube video sources.
Documents single file upload and supported file MIME types.

sources.title: Manage audio overview of your notebook (API)
notes: Documents create and delete methods for NotebookLM Enterprise audio overviews.
States a notebook can have only one audio overview at a time.

sources.title: Generate podcasts (API method)
notes: Documents standalone Podcast API under discoveryengine.googleapis.com v1.
States the API does not require a NotebookLM Enterprise notebook, Gemini Enterprise license, or data store, but does require an enabled Google Cloud project and Podcast API User role.
States access is GA with allowlist for select Google Cloud customers.

sources.title: What is NotebookLM Enterprise?
notes: Describes NotebookLM Enterprise as the compliant enterprise product.
Contrasts personal NotebookLM at notebooklm.google.com with enterprise URLs on notebooklm.cloud.google.com.
